creator: robbak@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 239358
config.log from the build.

Trying to install cad/ngspice_rework on my system fails at the install stage with:

===>  Installing for ngspice_rework-shlib-38
===>  Checking if ngspice_rework-shlib is already installed
===>   Registering installation for ngspice_rework-shlib-38 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/home/obj/ports/usr/ports/cad/ngspice_rework/work-shlib/stage/usr/local/lib/libngspice.so.0.0.4:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.


Checking that directory:

ls -l /usr/home/obj/ports/usr/ports/cad/ngspice_rework/work-shlib/stage/usr/local/lib/
total 3991
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel        2  9 Jan 08:34 debug
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       19  9 Jan 08:34 libngspice.so -> libngspice.so.0.0.5
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel       19  9 Jan 08:34 libngspice.so.0 -> libngspice.so.0.0.5
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  7224864  9 Jan 08:34 libngspice.so.0.0.5
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel        8  9 Jan 08:34 ngspice
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel        3  9 Jan 08:34 X11

This leaves me very confused!
